---
title: "Principles of Graphical Integrity"
source: "Lecture Material"
author: "Janice Akao"
institution: "Butler Community College"
competency: [Data Visualization]
main-format: [MSWord, Recording]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

Six general principles of graphical integrity 

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/butlercc_akao_general_principles_plots)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
